entries.title: FreeSurfer
entries.description: Software suite for processing and analyzing brain MRI images, including cortical surface reconstruction.

entries.title: Analysis of Functional NeuroImages
entries.description: A software suite for processing and analyzing fMRI data.

entries.title: Advanced Normalization Tools
entries.description: A software suite for image registration and segmentation.

entries.title: FMRIB Software Library
entries.description: A comprehensive library of neuroimaging analysis tools.

entries.title: Statistical Parametric Mapping
entries.description: A software package for analyzing brain imaging data.

entries.title: MRtrix3
entries.description: A software suite for diffusion MRI analysis including tractography, fixel-based analysis, and connectivity.

entries.title: MRtrix
entries.description: A software suite for advanced diffusion MRI processing and fiber tractography.

entries.title: Insight Toolkit
entries.description: An open-source library for image segmentation and registration used by many neuroimaging tools.

entries.title: Visualization Toolkit
entries.description: An open-source library for 3D computer graphics, image processing, and visualization.

entries.title: FastSurfer
entries.description: A deep learning-based alternative to FreeSurfer for fast brain segmentation and surface reconstruction.

entries.title: dcm2niix
entries.description: A tool for converting DICOM and PAR/REC images to NIfTI format.

entries.title: Convert3D
entries.description: A command-line tool for converting and processing 3D medical images.

entries.title: NIfTyReg
entries.description: A software package for efficient medical image registration.

entries.title: TORTOISE
entries.description: Tolerably Obsessive Registration and Tensor Optimization Indolent Software Ensemble for diffusion MRI processing.

entries.title: Human Connectome Project
entries.description: A large-scale project mapping neural connections in the human brain, with associated pipelines and data formats.

entries.title: Surface Mapper
entries.description: An AFNI program for surface-based brain visualization and analysis.

entries.title: SynthSeg
entries.description: A FreeSurfer deep learning tool for brain segmentation that works on any MRI contrast without retraining.

entries.title: SynthSR
entries.description: A FreeSurfer deep learning tool for super-resolution and contrast synthesis of brain MRI.

entries.title: SynthStrip
entries.description: A FreeSurfer deep learning tool for robust skull stripping across MRI contrasts and ages.

entries.title: Connectome Workbench
entries.description: A visualization and analysis tool for surface and volume neuroimaging data, especially HCP-style CIFTI files.

entries.title: Bayesian Estimation of Diffusion Parameters Obtained using Sampling Techniques
entries.description: An FSL tool for modeling crossing fibers in diffusion data.

entries.title: Probabilistic Tractography
entries.description: An FSL tool for probabilistic fiber tracking from diffusion data.

entries.title: Multivariate Exploratory Linear Optimized Decomposition into Independent Components
entries.description: An FSL tool for ICA-based analysis.

entries.title: Motion Correction FLIRT
entries.description: An FSL tool for intra-modal motion correction of fMRI time series.

entries.title: Structural Image Evaluation using Normalization of Atrophy (Cross-sectional)
entries.description: An FSL tool for cross-sectional brain volume estimation normalized for head size.

entries.title: Brain Intensity AbNormality Classification Algorithm
entries.description: An FSL tool for detecting white matter hyperintensities.

entries.title: Structural Image Evaluation using Normalization of Atrophy
entries.description: An FSL tool for longitudinal brain atrophy measurement between two time points.

entries.title: TOPUP
entries.description: An FSL tool for estimating and correcting susceptibility-induced distortions in EPI data.

entries.title: FMRIB's Linear Image Registration Tool
entries.description: An FSL tool for affine (linear) image registration.

entries.title: FMRIB's Nonlinear Image Registration Tool
entries.description: An FSL tool for nonlinear (warp) image registration.

entries.title: FMRIB's Integrated Registration and Segmentation Tool
entries.description: An FSL tool for subcortical structure segmentation.

entries.title: Smallest Univalue Segment Assimilating Nucleus
entries.description: An FSL noise reduction algorithm that preserves edges during smoothing.

entries.title: Phase Region Expanding Labeller for Unwrapping Discrete Estimates
entries.description: An FSL tool for 3D phase unwrapping.

entries.title: FMRIB Utility for Geometrically Unwarping EPIs
entries.description: An FSL tool for EPI distortion correction using field maps.

entries.title: EDDY Current Correction
entries.description: An FSL tool for correcting eddy current distortions and subject movement in diffusion data.

entries.title: Tract-Based Spatial Statistics
entries.description: An FSL tool for voxelwise analysis of diffusion data along white matter tracts.

entries.title: FMRIB's Expert Analysis Tool
entries.description: An FSL tool for model-based fMRI statistical analysis.

entries.title: FMRIB's Automated Segmentation Tool
entries.description: An FSL tool for brain tissue segmentation.

entries.title: Brain Extraction Tool
entries.description: An FSL tool for removing non-brain tissue from MRI images.

entries.title: RANDOMISE
entries.description: An FSL tool for non-parametric permutation inference on neuroimaging data.

entries.title: Permutation Analysis of Linear Models
entries.description: A tool for non-parametric inference using sign-flipping and permutation tests.

entries.title: Contrast of Parameter Estimates
entries.description: A statistical map representing a weighted combination of parameter estimates in GLM analysis.

entries.title: Variance of Contrast of Parameter Estimates
entries.description: The estimated variance of a COPE, used for higher-level mixed-effects analysis.

entries.title: FMRIB's Local Analysis of Mixed Effects
entries.description: An FSL method for mixed-effects group-level fMRI analysis.

entries.title: Neuroimaging Informatics Technology Initiative
entries.description: Standard file format (.nii) for storing brain imaging data.

entries.title: Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine
entries.description: Standard format for medical imaging data from scanners.

entries.title: Connectivity Informatics Technology Initiative
entries.description: A file format combining surface and volume neuroimaging data.

entries.title: Geometry Informatics Technology Initiative
entries.description: A file format for brain surface geometry data.

entries.title: Medical Imaging NetCDF
entries.description: A file format for medical imaging data used in neuroimaging research.

entries.title: Massachusetts General Hospital Format
entries.description: A neuroimaging file format used by FreeSurfer.

entries.title: Compressed MGH Format
entries.description: A gzip-compressed variant of the MGH file format used by FreeSurfer.

entries.title: Brain Imaging Data Structure
entries.description: A standard for organizing and describing neuroimaging datasets.

entries.title: MRtrix Image Format
entries.description: The native image file format used by MRtrix3 for storing neuroimaging data with header metadata.

entries.title: TrackVis Track Format
entries.description: A binary file format for storing streamline tractography results.

entries.title: Stereolithography Format
entries.description: A surface mesh file format used for 3D surface representations of brain structures.

entries.title: Magnetization Prepared Rapid Gradient Echo
entries.description: A T1-weighted MRI sequence commonly used for high-resolution structural brain imaging.

entries.title: Fluid-Attenuated Inversion Recovery
entries.description: An MRI sequence that suppresses CSF signal to reveal lesions.

entries.title: Resting-State Functional MRI
entries.description: Measures spontaneous brain activity when a subject is at rest.

entries.title: Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging
entries.description: Measures brain activity by detecting changes in blood oxygenation.

entries.title: Blood-Oxygen-Level-Dependent
entries.description: The MRI contrast mechanism underlying fMRI.

entries.title: Susceptibility Weighted Imaging
entries.description: An MRI technique sensitive to magnetic susceptibility differences between tissues.

entries.title: Diffusion Tensor Imaging
entries.description: An MRI technique that maps white matter tract orientation using water diffusion.

entries.title: Diffusion-Weighted Imaging
entries.description: An MRI technique sensitive to the diffusion of water molecules in tissue.

entries.title: Echo-Planar Imaging
entries.description: A fast MRI acquisition method commonly used in fMRI and diffusion imaging.

entries.title: Magnetic Resonance Imaging
entries.description: A non-invasive imaging technique using magnetic fields and radio waves.

entries.title: Positron Emission Tomography
entries.description: A nuclear imaging technique that measures metabolic processes.

entries.title: Magnetoencephalography
entries.description: A technique for mapping brain activity by recording magnetic fields.

entries.title: Electroencephalography
entries.description: A technique for recording electrical activity of the brain.

entries.title: Full Width at Half Maximum
entries.description: A measure of spatial smoothing kernel size.

entries.title: Field of View
entries.description: The extent of the area captured by the MRI scanner.

entries.title: Repetition Time
entries.description: The time interval between successive RF excitation pulses in an MRI sequence.

entries.title: Echo Time
entries.description: The time between RF excitation and signal measurement in an MRI sequence.

entries.title: B0 Field
entries.description: The main static magnetic field of an MRI scanner.

entries.title: Radio Frequency
entries.description: Electromagnetic pulses used to excite hydrogen nuclei in MRI.

entries.title: Proton Density
entries.description: An MRI contrast reflecting the concentration of hydrogen protons in tissue.

entries.title: Phase Encoding
entries.description: The MRI gradient direction along which spatial position is encoded by phase shifts.

entries.title: Magnetization Transfer
entries.description: An MRI technique that generates contrast based on interactions between free and bound water protons.

entries.title: T1-Weighted
entries.description: An MRI contrast where tissues with short T1 relaxation times (e.g. white matter) appear bright.

entries.title: T2-Weighted
entries.description: An MRI contrast where tissues with long T2 relaxation times (e.g. CSF) appear bright.

entries.title: T1-Weighted
entries.description: An MRI contrast where tissues with short T1 relaxation times (e.g. white matter) appear bright.

entries.title: T2-Weighted
entries.description: An MRI contrast where tissues with long T2 relaxation times (e.g. CSF) appear bright.

entries.title: Fixel
entries.description: A specific fiber population within a single voxel, used in fixel-based analysis to study individual fiber bundles.

entries.title: Anatomically-Constrained Tractography
entries.description: A tractography framework that uses tissue segmentation to improve biological plausibility of reconstructed tracts.

entries.title: Apparent Fiber Density
entries.description: A fixel-based measure of the density of a specific fiber population within a voxel.

entries.title: Spherical Harmonics
entries.description: A mathematical basis for representing functions on a sphere, used to model diffusion orientation distributions.

entries.title: Constrained Spherical Deconvolution
entries.description: A method for estimating fiber orientation distributions from diffusion data.

entries.title: Fiber Orientation Distribution
entries.description: A function describing the distribution of fiber orientations within a voxel.

entries.title: Orientation Distribution Function
entries.description: A function describing the probability of diffusion in each direction within a voxel.

entries.title: Generalized Fractional Anisotropy
entries.description: A diffusion anisotropy measure derived from the ODF, generalizing FA beyond the tensor model.

entries.title: b-value File
entries.description: A text file listing diffusion weighting strengths for each volume in a DWI acquisition.

entries.title: b-vector File
entries.description: A text file listing diffusion gradient directions for each volume in a DWI acquisition.

entries.title: Fractional Anisotropy
entries.description: A DTI-derived measure of white matter microstructural integrity (0 = isotropic, 1 = anisotropic).

entries.title: Mean Diffusivity
entries.description: A DTI-derived measure of the average rate of water diffusion in tissue.

entries.title: Axial Diffusivity
entries.description: A DTI-derived measure of water diffusion along the principal fiber direction.

entries.title: Radial Diffusivity
entries.description: A DTI-derived measure of water diffusion perpendicular to the principal fiber direction.

entries.title: Gray Matter
entries.description: Brain tissue containing neuronal cell bodies, found in the cortex and subcortical nuclei.

entries.title: White Matter
entries.description: Brain tissue containing myelinated axons that connect brain regions.

entries.title: Cerebrospinal Fluid
entries.description: The clear fluid surrounding the brain and spinal cord.

entries.title: White Matter Hyperintensity
entries.description: Bright regions on FLAIR MRI indicating white matter damage, often associated with aging or vascular disease.

entries.title: Independent Component Analysis
entries.description: A method for separating a signal into independent sub-components.

entries.title: Principal Component Analysis
entries.description: A dimensionality reduction technique.

entries.title: General Linear Model
entries.description: A statistical framework used for fMRI activation analysis.

entries.title: Hemodynamic Response Function
entries.description: Models the blood flow response to neural activity in fMRI.

entries.title: Intraclass Correlation Coefficient
entries.description: A measure of measurement reliability or agreement between raters.

entries.title: Analysis of Variance
entries.description: A statistical test for comparing means across multiple groups.

entries.title: Restricted Maximum Likelihood
entries.description: An estimation method for variance components that accounts for fixed effects in mixed models.

entries.title: Markov Chain Monte Carlo
entries.description: A class of sampling algorithms for estimating posterior distributions in Bayesian analysis.

entries.title: Singular Value Decomposition
entries.description: A matrix factorization method used for dimensionality reduction and noise filtering.

entries.title: Degrees of Freedom
entries.description: The number of independent values free to vary in a statistical model.

entries.title: Root Mean Square
entries.description: A statistical measure of the magnitude of a varying quantity, often used for motion estimates.

entries.title: Mean Squared Error
entries.description: The average of the squared differences between predicted and observed values.

entries.title: Standard Error of the Mean
entries.description: A measure of how precisely the sample mean estimates the population mean.

entries.title: False Positive Rate
entries.description: The proportion of negative cases incorrectly classified as positive.

entries.title: Receiver Operating Characteristic
entries.description: A curve plotting true positive rate against false positive rate across classification thresholds.

entries.title: Mutual Information
entries.description: A similarity metric for image registration that measures shared information between two images.

entries.title: Normalized Mutual Information
entries.description: A normalized variant of mutual information commonly used as a cost function in inter-modal registration.

entries.title: Sum of Squared Differences
entries.description: A similarity metric for image registration that sums pixelwise intensity differences squared.

entries.title: Temporal Signal-to-Noise Ratio
entries.description: The ratio of mean signal to temporal standard deviation, a measure of fMRI data quality.

entries.title: Derivative of RMS Variance
entries.description: A measure of the rate of change of BOLD signal across the brain at each time point.

entries.title: Framewise Displacement
entries.description: A scalar measure of head motion between consecutive fMRI volumes.

entries.title: Threshold-Free Cluster Enhancement
entries.description: A statistical method that avoids arbitrary cluster-forming thresholds.

entries.title: False Discovery Rate
entries.description: A statistical method for correcting multiple comparisons in neuroimaging.

entries.title: Family-Wise Error
entries.description: A method for controlling the probability of any false positive across all tests.

entries.title: Signal-to-Noise Ratio
entries.description: A measure of signal strength relative to background noise.

entries.title: Contrast-to-Noise Ratio
entries.description: A measure of contrast between tissues relative to noise.

entries.title: Region of Interest
entries.description: A specific brain area selected for targeted analysis.

entries.title: Volume of Interest
entries.description: A 3D region selected for analysis, similar to ROI.

entries.title: Voxel-Based Morphometry
entries.description: A technique for analyzing local differences in brain tissue composition.

entries.title: Cerebral Blood Flow
entries.description: A measure of blood supply to brain tissue.

entries.title: Arterial Spin Labeling
entries.description: A non-invasive MRI technique for measuring cerebral blood flow.

entries.title: Montreal Neurological Institute
entries.description: A standard brain coordinate space (MNI-152) used for spatial normalization.

entries.title: Talairach-Tournoux Atlas
entries.description: Stereotactic atlas coordinate system for mapping brain structures.

entries.title: Automated Anatomical Labeling
entries.description: A brain atlas that parcellates the cortex into anatomical regions.

entries.title: Right-Anterior-Inferior
entries.description: A neuroimaging coordinate system convention where axes point right, anterior, and inferior (AFNI default).

entries.title: Right-Anterior-Superior
entries.description: A neuroimaging coordinate system convention where axes point right, anterior, and superior.

entries.title: Left-Anterior-Superior
entries.description: A neuroimaging coordinate system convention where axes point left, anterior, and superior.

entries.title: Left-Posterior-Superior
entries.description: A neuroimaging coordinate system convention where axes point left, posterior, and superior (DICOM default).

entries.title: Anterior-Posterior
entries.description: A phase encoding direction running from the front to the back of the head.

entries.title: Posterior-Anterior
entries.description: A phase encoding direction running from the back to the front of the head.

entries.title: Left-Right
entries.description: A direction or phase encoding axis running from left to right.

entries.title: Right-Left
entries.description: A direction or phase encoding axis running from right to left.

entries.title: Superior-Inferior
entries.description: A direction or phase encoding axis running from top to bottom of the head.

entries.title: Computed Tomography
entries.description: An X-ray-based imaging technique that produces cross-sectional images of the body.

entries.title: Quality Control
entries.description: The process of checking data or results for artifacts, errors, or quality issues.

entries.title: Cross-Correlation
entries.description: A similarity metric used in image registration to measure alignment between images.

entries.title: Boundary-Based Registration
entries.description: A registration method that aligns images by optimizing contrast at tissue boundaries (e.g. white/gray matter).

entries.title: N4 Bias Field Correction
entries.description: An algorithm for correcting intensity non-uniformity (bias field) artifacts in MRI, from the ANTs toolkit.

entries.title: Functional Connectivity
entries.description: The statistical association between time series of spatially distinct brain regions.

entries.title: Automatic Cortical Parcellation
entries.description: A FreeSurfer atlas that divides the cortical surface into anatomical regions based on gyral and sulcal geometry.

entries.title: Automatic Subcortical Segmentation
entries.description: A FreeSurfer atlas that labels subcortical brain structures such as hippocampus, amygdala, and thalamus.
